script_text: Look! Let us talk about sentences.
A sentence is a group of words that tells a whole idea.
Every sentence has two special rules. Let us learn them!
Rule one. Every sentence starts with a capital letter.
Look at this sentence. The dog runs.
The first word is The. See the big capital T at the beginning?
Rule two. Every sentence ends with a mark.
A period. A question mark. Or an exclamation mark!
A period ends a telling sentence.
A question mark ends a question.
And an exclamation mark ends an excited sentence!
Watch. Here is a sentence that is missing its rules.
First, make the t a capital T.
Then add a period at the end. Now it follows both rules!
Now you are ready to practice! Find the sentences that follow the rules.
